2604.16851.title: Applications of deep generative models to DNA reaction kinetics and to cryogenic electron microscopy
2604.16851.paper_summary: This dissertation explores how deep generative models can advance the analysis of challenging biological problems by integrating domain knowledge with deep learning. It focuses on two areas: DNA reaction kinetics and cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM). In the first part, we present ViDa, a biophysics-informed framework leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs) and geometric scattering transforms to generate biophysically-plausible embeddings of DNA reaction kinetics simulations. These embeddings are reduced to a two-dimensional space to visualize DNA hybridization and toehold-mediated strand displacement reactions. ViDa preserves structure and clusters trajectory ensembles into reaction pathways, making simulation results more interpretable and revealing new mechanistic insights. In the second part, we address key challenges in cryo-EM density map interpretation and protein structure modeling. We provide a comprehensive review and benchmarking of deep learning methods for atomic model building, with improved evaluation metrics and practical guidance. We then present Struc2mapGAN, a generative adversarial network that synthesizes high-fidelity experimental-like cryo-EM density maps from protein structures. Finally, we present CryoSAMU, a structure-aware multimodal U-Net that enhances intermediate-resolution cryo-EM maps by integrating density features with structural embeddings from protein language models via cross-attention. Overall, these contributions demonstrate the potential of deep generative models to interpret DNA reaction mechanisms and advance cryo-EM density map analysis and protein structure modeling.
2604.16851.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文探討了深度生成模型如何通過將領域知識與深度學習相結合，推進對具有挑戰性的生物問題的分析。<lb/>它專注於兩個領域：DNA反應動力學和低溫電子顯微鏡（cryo-EM）。<lb/>在第一部分中，我們介紹了ViDa，一個基於生物物理的框架，利用變分自編碼器（VAEs）和幾何散射變換來生成生物物理上合理的DNA反應動力學模擬嵌入。<lb/>這些嵌入被縮減到二維空間，以可視化DNA雜交和以踏腳石為媒介的鏈置換反應。<lb/>ViDa保留了結構並將軌跡集群劃分為反應路徑，使模擬結果更具可解釋性，並揭示了新的機制見解。<lb/>在第二部分中，我們解決了低溫電子顯微鏡密度圖解釋和蛋白質結構建模中的關鍵挑戰。<lb/>我們提供了對原子模型構建的深度學習方法的全面回顧和基準測試，並改進了評估指標和實用指導。<lb/>然後，我們介紹了Struc2mapGAN，一個生成對抗網絡，從蛋白質結構合成高保真度的實驗類低溫電子顯微鏡密度圖。<lb/>最後，我們介紹了CryoSAMU，一個結構感知的多模態U-Net，它通過交叉注意力將密度特徵與來自蛋白質語言模型的結構嵌入相結合，增強了中等分辨率的低溫電子顯微鏡圖。<lb/>總的來說，這些貢獻展示了深度生成模型在解釋DNA反應機制和推進低溫電子顯微鏡密度圖分析及蛋白質結構建模方面的潛力。
2604.16851.author: Chenwei Zhang et.al.
